Class IDLLexer

java.lang.Object
antlr.CharScanner
org.apache.axis2.corba.idl.parser.IDLLexer
All Implemented Interfaces:
antlr.TokenStream, IDLTokenTypes
public class IDLLexer extends antlr.CharScanner implements IDLTokenTypes, antlr.TokenStream
